Class AnahataContextActionPresenter

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.AbstractAction
uno.anahata.asi.nb.annotation.AnahataContextActionPresenter
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, Serializable, Cloneable, EventListener, Action, org.openide.util.actions.Presenter, org.openide.util.actions.Presenter.Popup
public class AnahataContextActionPresenter extends AbstractAction implements org.openide.util.actions.Presenter.Popup
A presenter for the dynamic "AI Context" context menu.

This class implements Presenter.Popup to generate a hierarchical menu that allows users to add or remove selected files from active AI sessions. It centralizes the menu logic, replacing static MIME-type based actions.

V2 Migration: This presenter authoritatively uses the FilesContextActionLogic to interface with the V2 resource engine.

Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Details

    • AnahataContextActionPresenter

      public AnahataContextActionPresenter(Set<? extends org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)
      Constructs a new presenter for the given set of files.
      Parameters:
      files - The selected files.

  • Method Details

    • actionPerformed

      public void actionPerformed(ActionEvent e)

      This implementation is a no-op as the action is exclusively used as a Presenter.Popup to generate the dynamic submenus.

      Specified by:
      actionPerformed in interface ActionListener
      Parameters:
      e - The action event.

    • getPopupPresenter

      public JMenuItem getPopupPresenter()

      Implementation details: 1. Lists all active sessions (Agis) from the installer. 2. Provides an option to create a new session and immediately add the selection. 3. Dynamically filters the "Remove" menu to only show sessions containing the selection.

      Specified by:
      getPopupPresenter in interface org.openide.util.actions.Presenter.Popup
      Returns:
      A JMenuItem (specifically a JMenu) representing the context menu.
